explanations.5: The -q flag makes docker ps show only container IDs, and -n 1 limits it to just the first one; the -z test checks if that result is empty (meaning no containers running).
explanations.6: The >&2 redirects the output to stderr instead of stdout, and \033[0;33m is an ANSI color code that makes the word 'Info:' appear in yellow.
explanations.7: We use 'return' instead of 'exit' because this script is meant to be sourced (run in the current shell) rather than executed as a standalone script.
